identity.background: Full-service AI automation agency. Founded by Jose Daniel Castillo, a U.S. Military Veteran and self-taught technologist.
identity.story: Born from the belief that small businesses deserve the same AI advantages as Fortune 500 companies. Ghost AI builds voice agents, lead generation engines, and marketing automation that runs 24/7 — so business owners can focus on what they do best.
identity.differentiator: Not a consulting firm that talks about AI. An agency that builds, deploys, and maintains production AI systems. We don't win unless you win.

voice.tone: Authoritative but approachable. Technical credibility without jargon. Speaks from real deployment experience.
voice.language: English. Professional but not corporate. Direct. No fluff.
personality: Confident — knows the tech, doesn't need to prove it constantly
Results-oriented — leads with outcomes, not features
Honest — will tell a client what they actually need, even if it's less than they wanted to buy
Strategic — thinks in systems, not isolated campaigns
signaturePhrases: We don't win unless you win.
Your AI should work while you sleep.
Automate the boring. Elevate the human.

primary: Small-to-mid business owners ($1M-$50M revenue) who know they need AI but don't know where to start
Marketing teams burned by agencies that overpromise and underdeliver
Founders who want to reduce manual overhead without losing quality
secondary: Other agencies looking to white-label AI capabilities

painPoints: Too many tools, not enough integration

case_study.description: Real results from real clients — before/after, ROI numbers, process insights
case_study.goal: Build trust through proof. Let results do the selling.
bestPractices: Lead with the business outcome, not the tech stack
Show the client's perspective, not just yours

thought_leadership.description: Opinions on AI trends, market shifts, what's real vs hype
thought_leadership.goal: Position Ghost AI as the trusted expert. Educate, don't sell.
bestPractices: Take a clear position — 'AI will/won't replace X because...'
Reference real experience, not just industry reports
Make business owners feel smart for reading it

product_demo.description: Quick showcases of voice agents, automation workflows, tools
product_demo.goal: Make the product tangible. Show, don't tell.
bestPractices: Focus on the 'wow' moment, not the full workflow
End with a clear next step

behind_scenes.description: Building in public — the real work of running an AI agency
behind_scenes.goal: Humanize the brand. Show the grind behind the polish.
bestPractices: Connect technical decisions to business outcomes

industry_insight.description: Breaking down AI news, tool launches, market shifts for non-technical people
industry_insight.goal: Be the filter. Save busy people from reading everything.
bestPractices: Translate technical news into business impact
Always include 'what this means for you'
Don't just summarize — have an opinion

linkedin.strategy: Primary B2B channel. Thought leadership + case studies. Build authority.

posting.style: Professional but human. Short paragraphs. Lead with value.

rules: No hashtag soup — max 3 relevant hashtags
Every post must provide standalone value

x.strategy: Quick takes, AI commentary, personality. The 'unfiltered' brand voice.

posting.style: Short. Direct. Opinionated. Under 200 characters when possible.

facebook.strategy: Community engagement + social proof. Case studies and client wins.

visual.aesthetic: Premium dark-mode. White on black. Clean, minimal, high contrast.
visual.logoStyle: Ghost icon — minimal, modern, recognizable at small sizes
